attached_docs: KFM GitHub Repository Documentation Implementation Agent — Full Operating Prompt v3.1

validation_gates.reason: Scope is limited to the requested proof-pipeline README and the required generated-work receipt; no executable, fixture, workflow, schema, contract, policy, lifecycle, catalog, proof, release, runtime, deployment, or publication behavior is changed.

Main advanced after branch creation from f9c257b8f9ba9479bce69dfa2fd2411b9cdcf566 to 9e38544e3cde9b74895109c38f8ce128946a9c02 through unrelated temporal package documentation/provenance and generalized-infrastructure fixture documentation. The proof-index target and material proof evidence did not overlap, so branch history was preserved without force rewrite.

The existing pipelines/proofs/README.md identity and responsibility root are retained. Conflicting Directory Rules surfaces, proposed ADRs, the catalog proof compatibility redirect, and unresolved cross-domain test placement are explicit; no parallel authority is created.

The README distinguishes confirmed documentation, readme-only/conflicted test surfaces, Habitat workflow holds, and separate proof/receipt/catalog/release surfaces from proposed runners, fixtures, specs, receipt contracts, CI commands, and public behavior.

The final README has one H1, one closed KFM Meta Block v2, balanced code fences, 31 resolved internal links, intentional Markdown hard breaks only, no invalid trailing whitespace, and a final newline.

Inspected documentation and Habitat pull-request workflows use read-only contents permissions and explicit holds; no workflow, deployment, release, or publication path is changed by this documentation-only task.

The revision contains no credentials, restricted payloads, precise sensitive locations, living-person or genomic data, private operational details, infrastructure vulnerability data, or redaction-reversal instructions.

Existing lifecycle, evidence, policy, sensitivity, trust-membrane, no-direct-publish, correction, rollback, and release-separation rules are retained while implementation overclaims and speculative path authority are narrowed.

GitHub returned README blob 79297af6fa63694f18563addcaedcfed4cafe047 on commit 7c36a95a21d0f1e02334e9b17b7e2969c965af93; remote bytes exactly match the prepared 28,276-byte README and SHA-256 b8fe2bee224590b41b2813f6637ac2ebee4f41601b2ab483098787c1d6c7cc81.
Before this receipt was emitted, the review branch was one commit ahead of its pinned base with only pipelines/proofs/README.md changed.

The connector-first workflow did not clone or execute repository code. Repository evidence does not establish a generic accepted proof command for this lane; pull-request checks are observed separately.
This receipt contains the schema-required fields, allowed truth/review/outcome enums, SHA-256 patterns, an ISO-8601 timestamp, and no undeclared top-level properties.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation, validation, mergeability, release, and publication.
